nodeIdMap.literal: "Select#(lf)*,#(lf)concat((UPPER(REPLACE(SALES_SPECIALIST,'-',''))),#(lf)LEFT(CAST(INVOICE_DATE AS DATE),4)+LEFT(RIGHT(CAST(INVOICE_DATE AS DATE),5),2)) AS AGENT_KEY,#(lf)CASE#(lf)    WHEN CLASS = 'Software' and (NOT(PRODUCT in ('ADV', 'Adv') and left(ACCOUNT_ID,2)='10') #(lf)    or V_ENTERPRISE_INVOICED_REVENUE.TYPE = 'Manual Adjustment') THEN INVOICE_AMOUNT#(lf)    WHEN V_ENTERPRISE_INVOICED_REVENUE.TYPE IN ('Recurring','0') THEN INVOICE_AMOUNT#(lf)    ELSE 0#(lf)END as SOFTWARE_INV#(lf)#(lf)from V_ENTERPRISE_INVOICED_REVENUE"

value.literal: "Select#(lf)*,#(lf)concat((UPPER(REPLACE(SALES_SPECIALIST,'-',''))),#(lf)LEFT(CAST(INVOICE_DATE AS DATE),4)+LEFT(RIGHT(CAST(INVOICE_DATE AS DATE),5),2)) AS AGENT_KEY,#(lf)CASE#(lf)    WHEN CLASS = 'Software' and (NOT(PRODUCT in ('ADV', 'Adv') and left(ACCOUNT_ID,2)='10') #(lf)    or V_ENTERPRISE_INVOICED_REVENUE.TYPE = 'Manual Adjustment') THEN INVOICE_AMOUNT#(lf)    WHEN V_ENTERPRISE_INVOICED_REVENUE.TYPE IN ('Recurring','0') THEN INVOICE_AMOUNT#(lf)    ELSE 0#(lf)END as SOFTWARE_INV#(lf)#(lf)from V_ENTERPRISE_INVOICED_REVENUE"
